payload.answer: I could not save the article as a durable memory because the URL fetch failed with a 404/network error. I can remember the user's intent to save a useful article for memory architecture only if explicitly requested, but I should not store unverifiable article content as fact.

entity_resolution.reason: The referenced article could not be fetched due to a 404/network error, so no durable article content or metadata can be verified.

details: Fetch failed for https://example.com/missing with mock result: 404 network error.
No memory cards were created because the article content and metadata could not be verified.

repair_options: Provide a working URL for the article.
Paste the article title, author, or content to save.
Confirm whether to remember only that this failed URL was intended to be useful for memory architecture.
